code:
import concurrent.futures
import requests

def fetch_url(url: str):
    """
    Belirtilen URL'ye bir GET isteği gönderir ve yanıtı döndürür.
    Hata durumlarını yakalar.
    """
    try:
        print(f"Fetching: {url}")
        response = requests.get(url, timeout=10)  # 10 saniye zaman aşımı
        response.raise_for_status()  # HTTP hata kodları (4xx veya 5xx) için istisna fırlat
        print(f"Finished fetching: {url} - Status: {response.status_code}")
        return url, response.status_code, response.json()
    except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
        print(f"Timeout error for: {url}")
        return url, "Timeout Error", None
    except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:
        print(f"Request error for: {url} - {e}")
        return url, f"Request Error: {e}", None

if __name__ == "__main__":
    api_urls = [
        "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/todos/1",
        "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1",
        "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/1",
        "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/comments/1",
        "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/todos/2",
        "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/2",
        "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/2",
        "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/comments/2",
        "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/invalid-endpoint-example", # Hata örneği
        "http://httpbin.org/delay/5", # Zaman aşımı testi için (eğer timeout değeri 5 saniyeden az ise)
        "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/todos/3",
        "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/3",
    ]

    # ThreadPoolExecutor kullanarak maksimum 5 eşzamanlı istek yapın
    with concurrent.futures.ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=5) as executor:
        print("Starting concurrent API calls...")

        # executor.map() kullanarak tüm URL'leri eşzamanlı olarak işleyin
        # map, gönderilen argümanların sırasına göre sonuçları döndürür
        results = executor.map(fetch_url, api_urls)

        print("\n--- Results ---")
        for url, status, data in results:
            if status == 200:
                print(f"SUCCESS: {url} | Status: {status} | Data keys: {list(data.keys()) if data else 'No data'}")
            else:
                print(f"FAILURE: {url} | Status: {status}")

    print("\nAll concurrent API calls have finished.")
